All your people and AI agents working together.
Slack connects your team. Slackbot multiplies what they can do.
Get started
Find your plan
Trusted by top teams
Ask Slackbot
Plan launches
Run projects
Chat with clients
Automate tasks
Ask Slackbot
Plan launches
Run projects
Chat with clients
Automate tasks
Reimagine what’s possible with AI and agents.
AI in Slack doesn’t make you think, it helps you do. It summarizes and searches based on actual conversations, and with it, makes every app and agent more helpful and contextually aware than ever.
Update deals just by asking Slackbot
NEW

Get fast answers with Claude
NEW

What’s new in Slack
See all updates
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Today View
Your day used to start with a wall of messages and no clear place to begin.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Slackbot Native Charts
Slackbot can now create visual charts based on your underlying Slack, Salesforce and connected data - just ask.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Web Search
Slackbot now searches the web, and reads external links, to enrich your business context with real-time public information from the web.
Link may open in new tab
Feature Enhancement
Focus Mode
Sometimes the best thing you can do to get work done is quiet the distractions.
Link may open in new tab
Feature Enhancement
Block Kit Builder Updates
Building in Slack just got smoother.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Miles Davis in Slack Experience
New Miles Davis–inspired backgrounds, visual effects, and emoji reactions give every call a little more soul during your Huddles.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Slack comes included with every new Salesforce org
Every new Enterprise Edition and Unlimited Edition Salesforce org now comes with a Slack Free workspace — already connected, already configured, ready to go.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Salesforce Actions in Slackbot
Your CRM just got a whole lot more conversational.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
New Welcome Mat
Slackbot Home Updates introduces a personalized welcome mat with upcoming meetings, recommended Skills, and examples of how teammates are using Slackbot.
Link may open in new tab
Embedded AI
Slackbot Across Slack embeds AI assistance directly into the flow of work.
Knowledge
People
Process
Platform
Knowledge
Give everyone instant context.
Get access to every file, decision, and conversation, so you can build on past work instead of recreating it.
Meet Slackbot: Your personal agent for work.
Slackbot isn't just any AI. It's AI that knows you and your team. It coordinates work across your apps and agents so one conversation gets work done.
Learn more about Slackbot
One search to rule them all.
AI-powered search puts your company’s entire memory at your fingertips.
Learn about AI-powered search
Bring CRM data to the conversation.
Customer insights now live alongside conversations, so deals keep moving forward.
Learn about Salesforce in Slack
97 min
average time users can save weekly with AI in Slack
1
People
Let your people connect like people.
Slack’s conversational UI makes collaborating more approachable, whether you're working with a colleague or an agent.
It all starts with a channel.
Channels are flexible, transparent spaces for working with your team, AI assistants, and agents.
Learn about channels
When talking is easier than typing…
…hop on a huddle, our built-in video tool. With AI in Slack, your meeting notes take themselves.
Learn about huddles
Bring conversations out of the inbox.
Slack Connect lets you chat with clients and vendors in real-time, right from Slack. Email could never.
Learn about Slack connect
“Slack has been essential to our growth, our speed, and our ability to stay aligned as we scale”
Kate Jenson,
Head of Americas, Anthropic
Process
Manage all your work from one place.
Automate daily stand-ups, project updates, and approvals so your team can focus on growth instead of guesswork.
Anyone can automate in Slack.
By click or by code, Slack makes it easy for anyone to build time-saving automations of their own.
Learn about workflows
Manage projects and tasks.
Track. Approve. Mark as complete. All without leaving the conversation.
Learn about lists
A simpler way to get started.
Project manager's block? Beginning a brief? There’s a template for that.
See all templates
35%
increase in time saved due to automations for Slack users
2
Platform
Secure. Scaleable. Silo-free.
Our flexible, open platform is purpose-built for bringing the best agents and AI to every business, and can be tailored to fit however your teams work best.
From Atlassian to Zoom.
Google Drive. ChatGPT. Vercel. Box. Asana. Workday. You name it, it works in Slack.
See all integrations
Customize Slack to fit your needs.
Our platform is flexible so you can build solutions specific to your business.
Learn about dev tools
Work without worry.
If it’s shared in Slack, it’s safe. Our security program protects your data at every layer.
Learn about security
“Work starts in conversation. That’s why we see Slack as the natural place to build our agents.”
Guillermo Rauch,
CEO, Vercel
The most innovative companies run their business in Slack.
Slackbot helps MrBeast create viral videos.
Slack helps Box bring agents to every employee
Caraway Brings All The Right Ingredients Together In Slack
Slack helps Rivian do business in the fast lane
Slackbot helps MrBeast create viral videos.
Slack helps Box bring agents to every employee
Caraway Brings All The Right Ingredients Together In Slack
Slack helps Rivian do business in the fast lane
Get Started
Find Your Plan
We’re in the business of growing businesses.
90
%
of users say Slack helps them stay more connected

Messages sent daily

Don’t just take our word for it.
Slack is a leader in over 303 G2 market reports.

Slackbot (personal AI agent)
New
Your personal AI agent that understands conversations, files, and projects in Slack. Plan limits apply.
AI workflow generation
Build workflows from a single prompt with the power of Slack AI and Workflow Builder.
Enterprise search
Search across connected apps, databases, and systems with enterprise search.
AI daily recaps
Get a daily digest of what’s happening across all of your teams and projects.
AI file summaries

Multiple SAML configurations
Sign in with your IDP of choice. Supports 12 SSO options including Okta, Google, and Azure.
SCIM user management
Slack supports member provisioning with SCIM. Use a connector app and supported identity provider.
EMM integration support
Control mobile data with Enterprise Mobility Management like VMware AirWatch or Ivanti MobileIron.
Native data loss prevention
Data loss prevention in Slack Connect scans messages and files sent by members of your organization to reduce the risk of sharing confidential, malicious, or personally identifiable content with external orgs.

Terms & Conditions
To be eligible for this limited-time offer, you must be purchasing the Slack Pro or Business+ plan online within the first 7 days of creating your team. For more information on Slack’s plans and features, see
here
Opens in new window
. This 50% discount will only apply for the first 3 months from the date of your eligible upgraded plan (the “Discount Period”). After the Discount Period, Slack’s standard pricing will apply to the remainder of your plan and to any plan renewals.
By redeeming this offer, you agree that these offer terms form part of and modify Slack’s
Customer Terms of Service
Opens in new window
(or the terms of your written agreement regarding your use of Slack’s services) (your “Agreement”) entered into between you and the Slack entity identified in the Agreement and that, after the Discount Period, Slack’s then-current standard pricing set forth on Slack’s
Pricing Page
Opens in new window
will apply to the remainder of your plan and to any plan renewals. Please see the terms of your Agreement for information on how to cancel or downgrade your paid subscription prior to any such renewal. If you redeem this offer and then cancel your paid Slack plan or downgrade to a free plan during the Discount Period, this offer may no longer be available to you.
This offer cannot be combined with any other offer. Limit one offer per customer. Offer is non-transferable. This offer does not apply to annual plans or to upgrades to Slack’s Enterprise+ Plan. If you are interested in the Enterprise+ Plan, you can
contact our Sales team
Opens in new window
for more information. This offer is available for a limited time only, and prior to redemption by you, Slack may end or modify this offer at any time without notice to you.

Catch up on documents quickly with AI-powered summaries of shared files.
Inc

Slack 4.50.128
May 26, 2026
Bug Fixes
Thanks for updating the app! This round’s changes don’t lend themselves to tidy summaries, but we’re doing all that we can to make sure the app is running as smoothly as possible. Here’s to incremental gains!
Slack 4.49.89
April 28, 2026
Bug Fixes
Everything is an itty-bitty bit better than it was before. Trust us.
Slack 4.49.81
April 2, 2026
Bug Fixes
Ever have those weeks when it feels like nothing’s happening, but then you look back later and realize a lot of things actually were happening? This is one of those weeks for the app.
Slack 4.48.102
March 17, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.48.100
March 5, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.48.99
March 4, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.48.95
February 19, 2026
Bug Fixes
We tidied the shelves, cleaned the windows and ran a white-gloved finger over every flat surface. Just a little routine maintenance to ensure that everything is shipshape. Full steam ahead!
Slack 4.48.94
February 18, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.48.92
February 13, 2026
Bug Fixes
Hard work is happening this week, but nothing we can easily describe. It’s like a duck swimming on a pond. Under the water, the duck is paddling furiously, but on top all that can be seen is the gentle gliding of a bird on water. This week, Slack is the duck.
Slack 4.47.72
December 12, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.47.69
December 8, 2025
Bug Fixes
Don’t mind us — just making a few small adjustments to keep the app in tip-top shape. More to come soon. Cheerio!
Slack 4.47.65
November 24, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.47.59
November 10, 2025
Bug Fixes
Bugs were squashed, performance was improved, work was done, and the result was good. Please enjoy Slack responsibly.
Slack 4.46.104
October 21, 2025
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Slack 4.46.101
October 6, 2025
Bug Fixes
A little reminder as you go about your day: The world is a more unique place simply because you’re a part of it, and you’ve affected others in ways you can’t imagine. Oh, and no big changes to the app this time. Happy messaging!
Slack 4.46.99
September 22, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.46.96
September 10, 2025
Bug Fixes
We cleaned the code to make sure that everything’s running smoothly. Slack — now with a streak-free shine.
Slack 4.45.69
August 19, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.45.64
July 21, 2025
Bug Fixes
This week’s is not a huge update, but let that not convince you it’s unimportant. They can’t all be red-letter days (or updates), but each day we’re here is a good one. This update is a good one too.
Slack 4.45.60
July 14, 2025
Bug Fixes
A little reminder as you go about your day: The world is a more unique place simply because you’re a part of it, and you’ve affected others in ways you can’t imagine. Oh, and no big changes to the app this time. Happy messaging!
Slack 4.44.65
June 9, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.44.63
June 2, 2025
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Slack 4.44.60
May 19, 2025
Bug Fixes
The app is objectively better today than it was yesterday. This is a scientifically verifiable fact that cannot be challenged or undermined. We appreciate you staying up to date!
Slack 4.44.59
May 5, 2025
Bug Fixes
Ever have those weeks when it feels like nothing’s happening, but then you look back later and realize a lot of things actually were happening? This is one of those weeks for the app.
Slack 4.43.52
April 17, 2025
Bug Fixes
Don’t mind us — just making a few small adjustments to keep the app in tip-top shape. More to come soon. Cheerio!
Slack 4.43.51
March 31, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.43.49
March 20, 2025
Bug Fixes
We’ve sanded down some rough patches in the app so as to avoid any digital splinters. Did you know "digital splinters" were a thing? They are now, but they aren’t anything you’ll need to worry about.
Slack 4.43.44
March 10, 2025
Bug Fixes
We tidied the shelves, cleaned the windows and ran a white-gloved finger over every flat surface. Just a little routine maintenance to ensure that everything is shipshape. Full steam ahead!
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.42.120
February 17, 2025
What’s New
Starting with this version, Slack has changed our company registration in the MacOS desktop signing certificate from SLACK TECHNOLOGIES INC to SLACK TECHNOLOGIES, LLC following a similar change to our Windows desktop signing certificate in 2023. This change has been updated with our certificate registrar, and SLACK TECHNOLOGIES, LLC is the valid and correct publisher for new versions of Slack. If you’re suddenly seeing Slack being flagged by anti-virus software, the new binary and publisher name may need to be allowlisted by your company’s security policies. Many thanks for your understanding!
Slack 4.42.117
February 3, 2025
Bug Fixes
Minor tinkerings and tune-ups across the app. We appreciate your staying up to date! Let us know if you run into any problems by dropping us a line at
feedback@slack.com
.
Slack 4.42.115
January 21, 2025
Bug Fixes
Like a runner steadily improving their split times, this update is the sort that’s less showy but no less important. You’ll find the app a little faster, a little leaner, a little closer to the goal.
Slack 4.41.105
December 9, 2024
Bug Fixes
No big fixes to call out this week, but rest assured, there will be more in the future. Not that introducing bugs is our aim, of course. But missteps, adjustments, errors, and corrections — these are the rhythms of life and the price of growth. We hope you’re enjoying the ride, no matter where you happen to find yourself at present.
Slack 4.41.104
December 2, 2024
Bug Fixes
Hard work is happening this week, but nothing we can easily describe. It’s like a duck swimming on a pond. Under the water, the duck is paddling furiously, but on top all that can be seen is the gentle gliding of a bird on water. This week, Slack is the duck.
Slack 4.41.98
November 21, 2024
Bug Fixes
We tuned up the engine and gave the interiors a thorough clean. Everything is now running smoothly again.
Slack 4.41.97
October 24, 2024
Bug Fixes
We tuned up the engine and gave the interiors a thorough clean. Everything is now running smoothly again.
Slack 4.41.96
October 22, 2024
What’s New
Starting with version 4.41, Slack for macOS will also be available in PKG format. Please see https://slack.com/help/articles/360035635174-Deploy-Slack-for-macOS for more details.
Slack 4.40.133
October 10, 2024
Bug Fixes
Bugs were squashed, performance was improved, work was done, and the result was good. Please enjoy Slack responsibly.
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.40.128
September 12, 2024
Bug Fixes
Nothing major to report this week. Nothing minor to report either, as it turns out. Work is still happening, mind you — it’s just more the sort that happens behind the curtain in between scenes at a play. We’re quietly setting the stage for what’s to come.
Slack 4.40.126
September 5, 2024
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.40.120
August 27, 2024
Bug Fixes
We’ve tinkered with the internal workings and polished some rough edges. The app is now better than it was.
Slack 4.39.95
July 29, 2024
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Slack 4.39.90
July 8, 2024
Bug Fixes
The app is objectively better today than it was yesterday. This is a scientifically verifiable fact that cannot be challenged or undermined. We appreciate you staying up to date!
Slack 4.39.88
June 17, 2024
Bug Fixes
Users on macOS Monterey and later who were running the App Store version of Slack noticed that they were unable to share their screen, seeing prompts to enable permissions at the system level long after they had already been granted. They say it’s better to ask for forgiveness than permission. In this case, we’d like to beg forgiveness for repeatedly asking permission. 

Curious to learn more? Head o

Privacy Preference Center
We use three kinds of cookies on our websites: required, functional, and advertising. You can choose whether functional and advertising cookies apply. Click on the different cookie categories to find out more about each category and to change the default settings.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Required Cookies
Always Active
Required cookies are necessary for basic website functionality. Some examples include: session cookies needed to transmit the website, authentication cookies, and security cookies.
Cookies Details‎
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enhance functions, performance, and services on the website. Some examples include: cookies used to analyze site traffic, cookies used for market research, and cookies used to display advertising that is not directed to a particular individual.
Cookies Details‎
Advertising Cookies
Advertising Cookies
Advertising cookies track activity across websites in order to understand a viewer’s interests, and direct them specific marketing. Some examples include: cookies used for remarketing, or interest-based advertising.

analysis.name: Slack
analysis.tagline: All your people and AI agents working together.
analysis.value_proposition: An AI work platform that connects teams via persistent channels and embeds AI agents directly into the flow of work.
analysis.ideal_customer: Mid-to-large companies running complex cross-functional work who want a single pane for communication, automation, and AI agents — especially Salesforce customers.

features.name: channels
features.description: Persistent, topic-organized chat rooms for teams and projects
features.evidence_quote: Channels – Organize teams and work

features.name: direct messages
features.description: 1:1 and group private messaging between workspace members
features.evidence_quote: Messaging – Chat with your team

features.name: message threading
features.description: Reply to messages in a thread to keep conversations organized
features.evidence_quote: Using Slack

features.name: message history
features.description: Searchable archive of all messages; 90 days on free, unlimited on paid
features.evidence_quote: 90 days of message history… Upgrade to access the previous 12 months messages.

features.name: huddles
features.description: Lightweight audio and video meetings with screen sharing inside Slack
features.evidence_quote: Work together in real time through audio and video meetings (including screen sharing) using Slack huddles.

features.name: screen sharing
features.description: Share your screen during huddle meetings
features.evidence_quote: audio and video meetings (including screen sharing) using Slack huddles

features.name: clips
features.description: Asynchronous audio, video, and screen recordings shareable in channels
features.evidence_quote: Clips – Record and share updates

features.name: canvas
features.description: Rich, flexible docs embedded in channels for persistent team knowledge
features.evidence_quote: Canvas – Create rich, flexible docs

features.name: lists
features.description: Lightweight project and task tracker built natively inside Slack
features.evidence_quote: Lists – Organize, track and manage projects

features.name: templates
features.description: Pre-built templates to fast-start common tasks and workflows
features.evidence_quote: Templates – Start any task, fast

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Upload and share files directly within channels and messages
features.evidence_quote: File Sharing – Bring files to the flow of work

features.name: slack connect
features.description: Invite external partners into shared channels or DMs without leaving Slack
features.evidence_quote: Securely work alongside people outside of your company through one-to-one direct messages using Slack Connect.

features.name: slack connect group channels
features.description: Multi-org external collaboration in group chats or dedicated channels, up to 250 orgs
features.evidence_quote: Work securely with outside partners via DMs, group chats, or dedicated channels with up to 250 orgs.

features.name: workflow builder
features.description: No-code automation builder for everyday tasks and recurring processes
features.evidence_quote: Workflow Builder – Automate everyday tasks

features.name: ai workflow generation
features.description: AI generates workflow automations from natural-language prompts
features.evidence_quote: AI workflow generation

features.name: apps and integrations marketplace
features.description: 2,600+ third-party apps connectable to Slack via the App Directory
features.evidence_quote: Choose from over 2,600 apps in the Slack App Directory — from Salesforce, Jira, Google Drive, ChatGPT, and more.

features.name: app integrations limit
features.description: Free tier capped at 10 app integrations; paid tiers get unlimited
features.evidence_quote: Up to 10 apps… Unlimited app integrations

features.name: slackbot (personal ai agent)
features.description: Built-in personal AI agent that can answer questions, summarize, and take actions across connected data
features.evidence_quote: Slackbot – Power productivity with your personal AI agent

features.name: ai conversation summaries
features.description: AI-generated summaries of missed conversations and channels
features.evidence_quote: AI conversation summaries

features.name: ai daily recaps
features.description: AI-generated digest of activity across channels delivered daily
features.evidence_quote: AI daily recaps

features.name: ai file summaries
features.description: AI-generated summaries of files shared in Slack
features.evidence_quote: AI file summaries

features.name: ai search
features.description: AI-powered semantic search across Slack history and connected data
features.evidence_quote: AI search

features.name: enterprise search
features.description: Cross-tool unified search spanning Slack and connected third-party sources
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise Search – Find anything, all from a single search bar

features.name: agentforce integration
features.description: Salesforce Agentforce AI agents accessible directly within Slack
features.evidence_quote: Agentforce – Empower your whole team with AI-powered agents in Slack

features.name: agentic platform
features.description: Platform for building, customizing, and deploying AI agents inside Slack
features.evidence_quote: Agentic Platform – Customize, extend, and unify your tech stack in Slack

features.name: salesforce crm in slack
features.description: Salesforce CRM records, updates, and workflows surfaced natively in Slack
features.evidence_quote: Salesforce in Slack – Bring Salesforce into the flow of work

features.name: slack crm for small business
features.description: Lightweight CRM for SMBs managed directly in Slack with Slackbot assistance
features.evidence_quote: Slack CRM for Small Business – Manage customers in Slack with the help of Slackbot

features.name: today view
features.description: Personalized daily starting point surfacing priority messages and tasks
features.evidence_quote: Today View – Your day used to start with a wall of messages and no clear place to begin.

features.name: slackbot native charts
features.description: Slackbot generates visual charts from Slack, Salesforce, and connected data on demand
features.evidence_quote: Slackbot can now create visual charts based on your underlying Slack, Salesforce and connected data - just ask.

features.name: slackbot web search
features.description: Slackbot searches the live web and reads external links to enrich responses
features.evidence_quote: Slackbot now searches the web, and reads external links, to enrich your business context with real-time public information.

features.name: focus mode
features.description: Do-not-disturb mode that mutes distractions to support deep work
features.evidence_quote: Focus Mode – Sometimes the best thing you can do to get work done is quiet the distractions.

features.name: block kit builder
features.description: Visual builder for creating rich interactive message layouts for apps and workflows
features.evidence_quote: Block Kit Builder Updates

features.name: ai note-taking in huddles
features.description: Automated AI transcription and notes during Slack huddle meetings
features.evidence_quote: Turn on AI note-taking in huddles

features.name: sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise identity provider integration
features.evidence_quote: SAML-based single sign-on

features.name: scim user management
features.description: Automated user provisioning and deprovisioning via SCIM protocol
features.evidence_quote: SCIM user management

features.name: emm integration
features.description: Enterprise mobility management integration for mobile device policies
features.evidence_quote: EMM integration support

features.name: data loss prevention
features.description: Native DLP controls to prevent sensitive data from leaving the workspace
features.evidence_quote: Native data loss prevention

features.name: enterprise key management
features.description: Customer-managed encryption keys with ability to monitor and revoke access
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise Key Management – Monitor and revoke access

features.name: slack atlas
features.description: Rich employee directory with org charts and profile pages
features.evidence_quote: Slack Atlas – Discover rich profiles and org charts

features.name: user profile and preferences
features.description: Customizable user profiles including status, timezone, and notification settings
features.evidence_quote: Your profile & preferences

features.name: workspace administration
features.description: Admin controls for managing members, channels, permissions, and workspace settings
features.evidence_quote: Workspace administration

differentiators: Owned by Salesforce — native Salesforce CRM and Agentforce AI deeply embedded
Agentic platform enabling teams to build, deploy, and interact with AI agents in workflow
Slackbot as a personal AI agent with web search and chart generation
Enterprise Search spanning Slack and all connected third-party tools from a single bar
Slack Connect for secure cross-company collaboration without leaving Slack

recent_ships.what: Today View — personalized daily starting point replacing inbox overload
recent_ships.source: Today View – Your day used to start with a wall of messages and no clear place to begin.

recent_ships.what: Slackbot Native Charts — Slackbot generates visual charts from Slack and Salesforce data
recent_ships.source: Slackbot can now create visual charts based on your underlying Slack, Salesforce and connected data

recent_ships.what: Slackbot Web Search — Slackbot now searches live web and reads external links
recent_ships.source: Slackbot now searches the web, and reads external links, to enrich your business context

recent_ships.what: Focus Mode enhancement — distraction-muting mode for deep work
recent_ships.source: Focus Mode – Sometimes the best thing you can do to get work done is quiet the distractions.
Slack 4.48.102 – March 17, 2026 – Security Guidance: This release includes security improvements.

praised: Persistent channels and searchable message history valued for async collaboration
complaints: Significant price increases: 'Slack has raised our charges by $195k per year' (3406 upvotes)
WYSIWYG message editor redesign widely disliked: 'Slack's new WYSIWYG input box is terrible' (2776 upvotes)

free_tier.limits: 90-day message history; max 10 app integrations; 1:1 huddles only; 1:1 Slack Connect only; basic AI included

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 90-day history, 10 apps, 1:1 huddles, 1:1 Slack Connect, basic AI features

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited history, unlimited apps, group huddles, group Slack Connect up to 250 orgs

pricing.notes: Pro tier showing 50% promotional discount (to $4.38/mo) for first 3 months on monthly billing at time of scrape. Business+ tier likely exists between Pro and Enterprise but pricing page content was truncated in source. Enterprise Grid pricing is contact-sales only.
